summary: Frontend-only mockup testing for Cocoa Bean Grading IoT Dashboard. All 16 critical flows from review request passed via Playwright on viewport 1280x900. Login page is clean (no status indicators), tabs switch, password toggle works, dummy login admin/admin123 redirects to dashboard. Topbar contains only ESP32 + MQTT (no Camera). Full dashboard flow (start-measure -> weight increase -> lock -> capture -> analyze image -> fuzzy -> save) executes correctly. History filters by grade work, detail modal opens/closes. Settings save button is disabled when clean and enabled when dirty; reset works. Logout redirects to /login. Console clean (only React DevTools info).
critical_code_review_comments: AppContext: localStorage 'kakao_user' is hydrated but persisted on user changes; `user` initial state reads from storage so refreshes preserve session - works as expected.

Dashboard btn-analyze-image is disabled after first analysis (good - prevents double click), but if user re-captures a new image after analyze, they cannot reanalyze without reset. Minor UX consideration only.
Login.handleLogin uses setTimeout 600ms but `loading` is never reset on completion (component unmounts via navigate) - acceptable since redirect happens. If navigation fails, button stays disabled.
Settings PriceInput onChange uses parseInt(e.target.value || 0, 10) - if user clears field the value becomes 0 (NaN handled). Acceptable for mockup.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes - excellent testability.
test_credentials: Username: admin / Password: admin123 (dummy localStorage based, hardcoded in Login.jsx)
seed_data_creation: None - app uses sampleTransactions seeded into localStorage 'kakao_trx' (19 sample rows confirmed in History).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend mockup app on https://grading-hub-iot.preview.emergentagent.com. No backend. All data in localStorage (kakao_user, kakao_prices, kakao_trx). Test flow on viewport 1280x900 minimum (device-frame is fixed 800x480 centered). Dashboard flow requires waiting ~3s after start-measure-btn for weight to stabilize >10g before lock-weight-btn works. All 16 acceptance criteria passed in iteration_1.
